citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Machine learning algorithms will take advantage of any imbalances or correlations in the training set that help lower the error rate. If the dataset is not representative, those correlations can be misleading.
